codeExamples.emojicode:
📦 sockets 🏠

💭 Emojicode HTTP Client
💭 Compile: emojicodec example.🍇 -o example
💭 Run: ./example

🏁 🍇
  💭 Connection settings
  🔤localhost🔤 ➡️ host
  3011 ➡️ port
  🔤/canvas/tokens🔤 ➡️ path

  💭 Query parameters
  🔤clientId=qsl-integration-test🔤 ➡️ clientId
  🔤?🧲clientId🧲🔤 ➡️ queryString

  💭 Request body
  🔤{"data":{"x":400,"y":400,"actorId":"V5OF1QXHjaIy6iO8"}}🔤 ➡️ body

  💭 Build HTTP request
  🔤POST /canvas/tokens🧲queryString🧲 HTTP/1.1❌r❌nHost: localhost:3011❌r❌nx-api-key: c2f25bfd78a7fe3e7b3294dbf5f026285989fa0d7f7b73b2108305e68f64b796❌r❌nContent-Type: application/json❌r❌nContent-Length: 55❌r❌n❌r❌n🧲body🧲🔤 ➡️ request

  💭 Connect and send
  🍺 🆕📞 host port❗ ➡️ socket
  🍺 💬 socket 📇 request❗❗
  
  💭 Read and print response
  🍺 👂 socket 4096❗ ➡️ data
  😀 🍺 🔡 data❗❗
  
  💭 Close socket
  🚪 socket❗
🍉

codeExamples.python:
import requests

base_url = 'http://localhost:3011'
path = '/canvas/tokens'
params = {
    'clientId': 'qsl-integration-test',
    'documentId': 'GDOucEcvorBe3Ps2'
}
url = f'{base_url}{path}'

response = requests.delete(
    url,
    params=params,
    headers={
        'x-api-key': 'c2f25bfd78a7fe3e7b3294dbf5f026285989fa0d7f7b73b2108305e68f64b796'
    }
)
data = response.json()
print(data)

codeExamples.python:
import requests

base_url = 'http://localhost:3011'
path = '/measure-distance'
params = {
    'clientId': 'qsl-integration-test',
    'originX': '0',
    'originY': '0',
    'targetX': '500',
    'targetY': '500'
}
url = f'{base_url}{path}'

response = requests.get(
    url,
    params=params,
    headers={
        'x-api-key': 'c2f25bfd78a7fe3e7b3294dbf5f026285989fa0d7f7b73b2108305e68f64b796'
    }
)
data = response.json()
print(data)
